hyperedges.label: Sparrow Design Rationale: Duolingo Dark Theme + Zero-Dependency + Google Fonts Nunito

nodes.label: Duolingo Dark Theme Design
nodes.rationale: Duolingo's dark theme provides a familiar gamified learning interface that reduces eye strain and creates a modern aesthetic consistent with the app's casual learning approach.

nodes.label: Zero-Dependency Vanilla JS Architecture
nodes.rationale: No frameworks avoid build complexity, reduce load time, and allow the app to run from any browser by simply opening the HTML file — no server or build step required.

hyperedges.label: Sparrow Design Rationale: Duolingo Dark Theme + Zero-Dependency + Google Fonts Nunito
